name: Cursor Brain
description: Use Cursor Agent as the AI brain for OpenClaw via MCP

cursorPath.description: Path to cursor agent binary. Leave empty to auto-detect.

outputFormat.description: Output format for cursor-agent. Auto-detected if not set. Use 'stream-json' for streaming + thinking blocks, 'json' for batch.

proxyPort.description: Port for the local streaming proxy (OpenAI-compatible). Default 18790.

requestTimeout.description: Per-request timeout in ms. Min 60000. Synced to ~/.openclaw/cursor-proxy.json. Preserved on upgrade.

degradedTimeout.description: Timeout in ms when already degraded. Synced to cursor-proxy.json.

maxConsecutiveFailures.description: Consecutive failure threshold before proxy self-exits. Synced to cursor-proxy.json.

maxConsecutiveTimeouts.description: Consecutive timeout threshold before proxy self-exits. Synced to cursor-proxy.json.

streamResolveGraceMs.description: Grace period in ms after killing child before returning 503. Synced to cursor-proxy.json.

instantResult.description: Send batch results instantly. Synced to cursor-proxy.json.

forwardThinking.description: Stream LLM reasoning as reasoning_content. Synced to cursor-proxy.json.

streamSpeed.description: Chunked streaming chars/sec when instantResult is false. Synced to cursor-proxy.json.
